text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Is summer camp over already? We've gotta say
goodbye to this home away from home?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'll miss you, summer caaaamp! Sob... Are you sure we can't stay one more day?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin and Hayahide will be there too! I gotta make it the best race ever!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! It's full speed back to home!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Winning Ticket's event-filled
summer camp comes to an end.
